cases.description: Jan 31 + 1 month clamps to the last day of February in a leap year (2024-02-29); result is the underlying date serial number
cases.expected_note: 2024 is a leap year; Feb has no 31st so EDATE clamps to Feb 29 = serial 45351

cases.description: Negative months argument goes backward (2024-01-15 = serial 45306)
Non-integer months argument is truncated toward zero, not rounded (2024-02-01 = serial 45323)
